scene: A doodle stick figure at a gas station pumping fuel into a little car, with a thought bubble above showing a big green dinosaur. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cartoon dinosaur squashed flat deep underground between rock layers, melting into a black puddle of oil. Flat brown earth-layer background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A magnified underwater view of ocean water full of tiny cute smiling plankton dots and little green algae blobs floating around. Flat teal ocean background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Countless tiny plankton specks drifting down like snow and piling up in a thick layer on a dark deep sea floor. Flat deep navy underwater background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Thick layers of mud and rock pressing down on a buried layer with big bold downward pressure arrows, and glowing orange heat and flames rising from below. Flat dark brown underground background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Shiny black oil droplets and little gas bubbles squeezing out of a cracked cooked rock layer and rising upward. Flat dark slate background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
An ancient swamp forest with giant ferns and tall trees toppling over into dark murky swamp water. Flat mossy green background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A happy little car driving along, its clear fuel tank showing a smiling green pond-scum blob inside, while a tiny dinosaur waves goodbye from behind the car. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
